homepage.heroSubline: From selective interior guts to complete building teardowns, we handle it all. Get a free, no-obligation quote today.
aboutText: DS Demolition & Haul Off, LLC is a family-owned and operated demolition contractor serving the Dallas area. We started with a single truck and a commitment to honest, hard work. Today, we're a trusted name for residential and commercial demolition projects across the metroplex.

Our approach is simple: safety first, quality work, and clear communication. We understand that demolition can be disruptive, so we prioritize minimizing the impact on your property and neighborhood. We use the right equipment and techniques to get the job done efficiently and safely.

We're proud to be a part of the Dallas community. We believe in giving back and supporting local organizations. We're committed to responsible demolition practices, including recycling and proper disposal of materials.

valueProps.title: Safety Focused
valueProps.description: We prioritize safety on every job site, protecting our team, your property, and the environment.

valueProps.title: Experienced Professionals
valueProps.description: Our team has the expertise to handle any demolition project, big or small, residential or commercial.

valueProps.title: Competitive Pricing
valueProps.description: We offer fair and transparent pricing with no hidden fees. Get a free, detailed estimate today.

valueProps.title: Licensed & Insured
valueProps.description: We are fully licensed and insured for your peace of mind. We meet all local and state regulations.

homepage.ctaSubline: Contact us today for a free consultation and estimate.

services.name: Residential Demolition
services.shortDescription: Safe and efficient demolition services for Dallas homes.
services.description:
DS Demolition & Haul Off, LLC provides comprehensive residential demolition services in the Dallas area. Whether you're renovating a 1950s ranch in Lake Highlands or clearing a lot for new construction in Preston Hollow, we have the expertise to handle your project safely and efficiently.

We specialize in interior gutting, kitchen and bathroom demolition, garage removal, and complete house teardowns. We understand the unique challenges of working in established Dallas neighborhoods, including tight spaces and strict noise ordinances. Our team is trained to minimize disruption and maintain a clean work site.

We handle all aspects of the demolition process, from obtaining necessary permits to disconnecting utilities and safely removing debris. We prioritize responsible disposal and recycling whenever possible. Our goal is to provide a seamless and stress-free experience for our clients.
process: Step 1: Site Assessment & Planning - We evaluate the project and create a detailed demolition plan.
Step 2: Permitting & Utility Disconnection - We handle all necessary permits and disconnect utilities safely.
Step 3: Demolition - We execute the demolition plan efficiently and safely, minimizing disruption.
Step 4: Debris Removal & Site Cleanup - We remove all debris and leave the site clean and ready for the next phase.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for residential demolition in Dallas?
faq.answer: Yes, in most cases, a permit is required for residential demolition. We handle the permit process for you, ensuring compliance with all local regulations.

faq.question: How long does residential demolition take?
faq.answer: The timeline varies depending on the size and complexity of the project. A small interior demolition might take a day or two, while a complete house teardown could take a week or more. We provide a detailed timeline during the initial consultation.

faq.question: What happens to the debris after demolition?
faq.answer: We prioritize responsible disposal and recycling. We work with local recycling centers to divert materials from landfills whenever possible. Non-recyclable debris is disposed of at licensed landfills.

services.name: Commercial Demolition
services.shortDescription: Expert commercial demolition services for businesses in Dallas.
services.description:
DS Demolition & Haul Off, LLC offers comprehensive commercial demolition services for businesses in Dallas and the surrounding areas. From office buildings in Uptown to retail spaces in Deep Ellum, we have the experience and equipment to handle any commercial demolition project.

We specialize in interior demolition, selective demolition, building teardowns, and site clearing. We understand the importance of minimizing disruption to your business operations and surrounding tenants. Our team works efficiently and safely to complete projects on time and within budget.

We handle all aspects of the commercial demolition process, including environmental assessments, asbestos abatement (if needed), and proper disposal of hazardous materials. We are committed to responsible demolition practices and adhere to all local and state regulations.
process: Step 1: Site Survey & Planning - A thorough assessment to determine the best approach.
Step 2: Environmental Assessment - Checking for hazardous materials like asbestos.
Step 3: Permitting & Notifications - Ensuring compliance with city ordinances.
Step 4: Controlled Demolition - Executing the plan with precision and safety.

faq.question: Do you handle asbestos abatement?
faq.answer: Yes, we are licensed and experienced in asbestos abatement. We follow all EPA and OSHA regulations to ensure safe removal and disposal of asbestos-containing materials.

faq.question: What permits are required for commercial demolition in Dallas?
faq.answer: The required permits vary depending on the scope of the project. We handle all necessary permits and ensure compliance with city regulations.

faq.question: How do you minimize disruption to surrounding businesses?
faq.answer: We work closely with our clients to develop a demolition plan that minimizes noise, dust, and traffic. We also coordinate with surrounding businesses to minimize disruption to their operations.

services.name: Concrete Removal
services.shortDescription: Professional concrete removal services in Dallas, TX.
services.description:
DS Demolition & Haul Off, LLC provides expert concrete removal services for residential and commercial properties throughout Dallas. Whether you need to remove an old driveway, patio, foundation, or sidewalk, we have the equipment and expertise to get the job done quickly and efficiently.

Concrete removal can be a challenging and labor-intensive task. Our team uses specialized equipment, including jackhammers, concrete saws, and skid steers, to break up and remove concrete safely and efficiently. We also handle the disposal of concrete debris in an environmentally responsible manner.

We understand the importance of minimizing disruption to your property and surrounding areas. Our team takes precautions to control dust and noise during the concrete removal process. We also ensure that the site is left clean and ready for the next phase of your project.
process: Step 1: Site Preparation - Clearing the area and protecting surrounding surfaces.
Step 2: Concrete Cutting & Breaking - Using specialized equipment to break down the concrete.
Step 3: Debris Removal - Loading and hauling away the concrete debris.
Step 4: Site Cleanup - Ensuring a clean and level surface.

faq.question: Can you remove reinforced concrete?
faq.answer: Yes, we have the equipment and expertise to remove reinforced concrete. We use specialized cutting tools to cut through the rebar and break up the concrete.

faq.question: How much does concrete removal cost?
faq.answer: The cost of concrete removal varies depending on the size and thickness of the concrete, as well as the accessibility of the site. We provide free, no-obligation estimates.

faq.question: What do you do with the concrete debris?
faq.answer: We recycle concrete debris whenever possible. We work with local recycling centers to crush the concrete and reuse it as aggregate.

services.name: Interior Demolition
services.shortDescription: Dallas's premier interior demolition and gutting services.
services.description:
DS Demolition & Haul Off, LLC specializes in interior demolition services throughout Dallas. From gutting outdated kitchens in historic Munger Place bungalows to preparing office spaces in Uptown for renovation, we handle projects of all sizes with precision and care.

Our team is experienced in removing walls, flooring, ceilings, and fixtures while minimizing dust and disruption. We understand the importance of protecting existing structures and utilities during the demolition process. We’re particularly careful when working in older Dallas homes with unique architectural details.

We prioritize safety and cleanliness, using dust control measures and proper ventilation to protect your health and property. We also handle the removal and disposal of all debris in an environmentally responsible manner.
process: Step 1: Pre-Demolition Assessment: We evaluate the project scope and identify any potential hazards.
Step 2: Protection & Containment: We protect surrounding areas with plastic sheeting and dust barriers.
Step 3: Selective Demolition: We carefully remove designated materials and structures.
Step 4: Debris Removal & Cleanup: We haul away all debris and leave the space clean and ready for renovation.

faq.question: How do you control dust during interior demolition?
faq.answer: We use a combination of techniques to control dust, including HEPA filtration vacuums, plastic sheeting to contain the work area, and regular misting of surfaces.

faq.question: Can you remove load-bearing walls?
faq.answer: Removing load-bearing walls requires careful planning and structural support. We can assess the wall and, if necessary, work with a structural engineer to ensure the safety of the building.

faq.question: How long does interior demolition take?
faq.answer: The timeline depends on the size and complexity of the project. A small bathroom demolition might take a day, while a complete interior gutting could take several days or weeks.

services.name: Selective Demolition
services.shortDescription: Targeted demolition services, preserving what matters most.
services.description:
DS Demolition & Haul Off, LLC offers selective demolition services in Dallas, providing targeted removal of specific building components while preserving surrounding structures. This service is ideal for renovations, remodeling projects, and historical preservation efforts in areas like the Bishop Arts District or around the Dallas Arts District.

We carefully remove walls, flooring, fixtures, and other materials while minimizing damage to adjacent areas. Our team is skilled in using hand tools and specialized equipment to ensure precision and control. We understand the importance of preserving architectural details and historical elements during selective demolition projects.

We work closely with contractors, architects, and homeowners to develop a demolition plan that meets their specific needs. We prioritize safety and cleanliness, using dust control measures and proper ventilation to protect your health and property.
process: Step 1: Detailed Planning & Marking: Identifying areas for removal and protection.
Step 2: Careful Removal: Using hand tools and specialized equipment for precise demolition.
Step 3: Debris Management: Removing debris while minimizing dust and disruption.
Step 4: Site Preparation: Preparing the area for the next phase of construction.

faq.question: What is selective demolition?
faq.answer: Selective demolition involves carefully removing specific building components while preserving surrounding structures. It is often used for renovations, remodeling projects, and historical preservation efforts.

faq.question: How do you protect existing structures during selective demolition?
faq.answer: We use a variety of techniques to protect existing structures, including bracing, shoring, and protective coverings. Our team is trained to minimize damage and ensure the safety of the building.

faq.question: What types of projects benefit from selective demolition?
faq.answer: Selective demolition is ideal for projects that require targeted removal of specific building components, such as kitchen and bathroom remodeling, historical preservation, and commercial renovations.

services.name: Demolition Debris Hauling Services
services.shortDescription: Fast and reliable debris hauling for Dallas demolition projects.
services.description:
DS Demolition & Haul Off, LLC provides comprehensive demolition debris hauling services in Dallas. We understand that removing debris quickly and efficiently is crucial to keeping your project on schedule. Whether you're clearing a construction site in Frisco or renovating a home in Plano, we have the trucks and equipment to handle all your debris hauling needs.

Our team is experienced in hauling a wide range of demolition debris, including concrete, wood, metal, and drywall. We prioritize responsible disposal and recycling, working with local recycling centers to divert materials from landfills whenever possible. We also ensure that all debris is transported safely and legally.

We offer flexible scheduling and competitive pricing to meet your specific needs. Our goal is to provide a hassle-free debris hauling experience that allows you to focus on your core business.
process: Step 1: Debris Assessment: Evaluating the type and volume of debris to be hauled.
Step 2: Container Delivery (if needed): Providing dumpsters or roll-off containers for debris collection.
Step 3: Efficient Loading: Loading debris safely and efficiently.
Step 4: Responsible Disposal: Transporting debris to licensed landfills or recycling centers.

faq.question: What types of debris do you haul?
faq.answer: We haul a wide range of demolition debris, including concrete, wood, metal, drywall, and roofing materials.

faq.question: Do you offer dumpster rentals?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer dumpster rentals in a variety of sizes to meet your specific needs.

faq.question: How do you ensure responsible disposal of debris?
faq.answer: We work with licensed landfills and recycling centers to ensure that all debris is disposed of in an environmentally responsible manner.

serviceAreas.content:
DS Demolition & Haul Off, LLC is proud to serve the dynamic city of Fort Worth, Texas. From the historic Stockyards to the vibrant cultural district, we understand the diverse needs of Fort Worth residents and businesses. We're equipped to handle demolition projects of all sizes, from removing old sheds in the backyard to preparing sites for new construction downtown.

We have extensive experience working with the unique architectural styles found in Fort Worth, including the charming craftsman bungalows near downtown. We understand the importance of preserving the character of these neighborhoods while providing efficient and safe demolition services. Our team is dedicated to responsible waste disposal and recycling, helping to keep Fort Worth beautiful. We're prepared for the hot, humid summers and ensure projects are completed efficiently and safely.

reviews.name: Maria G.
reviews.text: DS Demolition did an excellent job tearing down our old garage. They were quick, efficient, and cleaned up everything perfectly. Highly recommend their services!

reviews.name: Robert K.
reviews.text: These guys removed an old concrete patio in my backyard. They were professional and careful not to damage the surrounding landscaping. Good service at a fair price.

reviews.name: Susan L.
reviews.text: DS Demolition gutted our kitchen before our remodel. They were very respectful of our home and did a great job containing the dust. The crew was professional and courteous.

reviews.name: David M.
reviews.text: We hired DS Demolition to remove some interior walls in our office space. They completed the project quickly and efficiently, with minimal disruption to our business operations. Great communication throughout the process.

reviews.name: Jennifer P.
reviews.text: I needed a large amount of demolition debris hauled away after a DIY project. DS Demolition provided a prompt and reliable service. Their pricing was very competitive.

reviews.name: Michael S.
reviews.text: The team at DS Demolition did a fantastic job with the selective demolition of a wall in my home. They were very careful not to damage the surrounding areas and cleaned up thoroughly afterward. I would definitely use them again.
